SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.utils

Class JkUtilsPath

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.utils.JkUtilsPath
public final class JkUtilsPath extends Object
Utility class providing convenient methods to deal with Path. Mainly for wrapping checked exceptions and handle safely null parameters.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    JkUtilsPath.JkZipRoot
    A container object representing both a zip file and its content.

  • Method Details

    • friendlyName

      public static String friendlyName(Path path)

    • disambiguate

      public static List<Path> disambiguate(Iterable<Path> paths)
      As Path implements Iterable<Path> it is not obvious if an Iterable of Path was intended to be a list of Path or a single Path. This method helps by returning a list of Path containing either a single element if the argument was an instance of Path nor a list of elements contained in the iterable argument.
      Parameters:
      paths -
      Returns:

    • firstExisting

      public static Path firstExisting(Path... paths)
      Returns the first specified path that exist. Returns null if none.

    • createFile

      public static void createFile(Path path, FileAttribute<?>... attrs)
      Delegates to Files.createFile(Path, FileAttribute[])s

    • createFileSafely

      public static void createFileSafely(Path path, FileAttribute<?>... attrs)
      Delegates to Files.createFile(Path, FileAttribute[]) but checking first if the specified file does not already exist. If so, do nothing, else creates parent directories if needed prior creating the file.

    • write

      public static void write(Path path, byte[] bytes, OpenOption... options)
      Delegates to Fileswrite(Path, byte[], OpenOption...)

    • getResourceAsPath

      public static Path getResourceAsPath(Class<?> clazz, String resourceName)
      Retrieves the path to a resource by its name from the same class loader as the specified class.
      Parameters:
      clazz - the class used to retrieve the resource's class loader
      resourceName - the name of the resource to locate
      Returns:
      the Path object corresponding to the resource location
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the resource cannot be located
      RuntimeException - if there is an error converting the resource URL to a Path

    • createTempDirectory

      public static Path createTempDirectory(String prefix, FileAttribute... fileAttributes)
      Delegates to FilescreateTempDirectory(String, FileAttribute[])

    • newDirectoryStream

      public static DirectoryStream<Path> newDirectoryStream(Path root, DirectoryStream.Filter<Path> filter)

      Get the url to the specified path.

    • walk

      public static Stream<Path> walk(Path path, FileVisitOption... options)

    • walk

      public static Stream<Path> walk(Path path, int deep, FileVisitOption... options)

    • walkFileTree

      public static void walkFileTree(Path path, FileVisitor<Path> visitor)

    • copyDirContent

      public static int copyDirContent(Path sourceDir, Path targetDir, PathMatcher pathMatcher, CopyOption... copyOptions)
      Copies the content of the source directory into the target directory. The root of source directory is not created as an entry of the target directory.
      Returns:
      the copied file count.

    • childrenCount

      public static int childrenCount(Path dir, int max, boolean includeDirectories, PathMatcher pathMatcher)
      Returns the file count contained in the specified directory (recursively) to concurrence to specified max count. If the effective count is greater than max count, returns max + 1. This method is designed to stop file traversal as soon as count is greater than max.

    • relativizeFromWorkingDir

      public static Path relativizeFromWorkingDir(Path path)
      Returns the relative path to working dir of the specified path. Returns the specified path itself, if this one is already relative.

    • relativizeFromDirIfAbsolute

      public static Path relativizeFromDirIfAbsolute(Path referent, Path pathToRelativize)
      Returns the relative path to working dir of the specified path. Returns the specified path itself, if this one is already relative.

    • getLastModifiedTime

      public static Optional<Long> getLastModifiedTime(Path path, LinkOption... options)

    • size

      public static long size(Path path)

    • touch

      public static void touch(Path path)

    • register

      public static WatchKey register(Path dir, WatchService watchService, WatchEvent.Kind<?>... watchEventKinds)

    • moveDir

      public static void moveDir(Path source, Path target)
      Move directory along all its children and subdirectories recursively
